chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Transfer App. No. S – 66 of 2023 (Asgher Ali versus Abdul Razzaque & others) Date of hearing: 12.02.2024 Date of decision: 12.02.2024 Mr. Abdul Sattar N. Soomro, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Shuhab Deen Siyal, Advocate for respondents No.3 & 4. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy Prosecutor General. O R D E R Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro, J. – This transfer application has been filed for transferring Criminal Direct Complaint Case No.460/2022 pending before learned Additional Sessions Judge-III, Naushahro Feroze to any other Court on the grounds that Presiding Officer has destroyed the case in that he has amalgamated the complaint case with the State case and is proceeding both the cases together; that Presiding Officer is recording evidence in the State case instead of recording evidence in the direct complaint; the Presiding Officer is prejudiced and insulting complainant in the open Court in front of the accused. 2. During arguments of this application, it has transpired that the Presiding Officer of the Court has been transferred and replaced by some other Additional Sessions Judge. 3. In view of such position, this application, having become infructuous, in that the Presiding Officer against whom applicant had a grievance has been transferred, is accordingly dismissed. J U D G E Abdul Basit
